content:
Action:2
I am moving the avatar to the left from its starting position at the bottom-right corner to reach a more central position, which will allow me to better react to and shoot the aliens as they spawn from the portals.

Action:2 
Feedback:I am moving the avatar left from (10, 29) to (10, 28) to eventually align with the alien at column 0 and shoot it.

Action:2
